labels.text_upload: Click to upload or drag and drop SVG, PNG, JPG or GIF (max. 800x400px)
labels.text_upload_signature_description: SVG, PNG, JPG or GIF (resized to 250x250px)

payment_schema.pargraph_1: The customer makes the FULL amount payment to the platform (Drivini), then the amount will be transferred to transfer company (to the banking details that partner indicated when   signing the agreement) while deducting the markup.
payment_schema.item_1: Your partner provides its products at a negotiated NET rate.
payment_schema.item_2: Through the platform (admin carriers), you form the final prices by adding your markup.
payment_schema.item_3: Payments for reservations come to the platform bank account, in return you pass the NET price to your partner.

messages.success_update_payment: Payment schema has been updated successfully

translations.title: Multilingual
translations.sub_title: Let your website content available in multi-languages. It will be more comfortable for users to know about you in their preferable language.

alerts.warning: The section {{section}} is not fully translated. Translate it into {{language}} and attract foreign users.

empty.title: There are no content localization available at the moment.
empty.title_active_language: There are no active language available at the moment.
empty.message_active_language: Active language is the language in which your website is currently displayed. You can change it in the Settings section.

empty.title: There are no translation available at the moment.

translate.title: The 'Translate' button
translate.description: It appears when you click on the translation field. By clicking on this button, the text will be translated automatically.

actions.title: Translation confirmed or cancelled
actions.description: Buttons appear when you click on the translation field. The tick button confirms the translation. The eraser button resets the made changes.

input_orange.title: Orange mark
input_orange.description: It shows that there is no translation or the translation was done automatically but has not been confirmed by a user.

input_green.title: Green mark
input_green.description: It shows that the translation has been confirmed by a user.

dot_orange.title: Orange indicator in the menu on the left
dot_orange.description: It shows that there are texts in the section without translation.

dot_green.title: Green indicator in the menu on the left
dot_green.description: It shows that all texts in the section have translation.

dot_grey.title: Grey indicator in the menu on the left
dot_grey.description: It shows that there is no texts in the section to be translated.
